description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Cross-boundary Transport Services and Special Traffic Arrangements  for long weekend of Ching Ming Festival Holiday 2025
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 2025年清明節假期長周末的陸路跨境交通服務及特別交通安排

2025-04-02T17:52:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department (TD) anticipates that there may be a large number of cross-boundary passengers using public transport services to travel to and from the Mainland and Macao via the land boundary control points during long weekend of the Ching Ming Festival holiday. In the meantime, the number of cross boundary private cars travelling to and from the Mainland and Macao via the land boundary control points will also increase substantially. The TD has put in place the corresponding traffic and transport arrangements. Travelers are advised to plan their journeys ahead and travel outside peak periods as far as possible. To plan journeys ahead, the public can make use of TD’s “HKeMobility” mobile application to access the snapshots of traffic conditions at inbound and outbound vehicle plazas of Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) Hong Kong Port, and they can also check the real-time situations of the vehicle clearance plaza of HZMB Zhuhai Port through the WeChat official accounts “hzmbzhport” or “zhuhaifabu” (traffic-info. gzazhka. com:5015/#/) (Chinese only), and check the forecast of peak hours of inbound and outbound vehicles at HZMB Zhuhai Port through the WeChat official account of the HZMB integrated information dissemination platform (mp. weixin. qq. com/s/mT9D9et-FybKKXDw9nJ9Dg) (Chinese only). Moreover, motorists are reminded to always comply with the traffic control measures implemented by the Zhuhai authority when driving on the HZMB Main Bridge. Vehicles shall not occupy the emergency lane unless instructed by the Zhuhai authority. Motorists are advised that, subject to actual traffic conditions, special traffic arrangements may be implemented at Lok Ma Chau Control Point and Shenzhen Bay Port from 4 to 6 April 2025 to allow smooth access of public transport vehicles to above control points. Motorists are advised to pay special attention to variable message signs and traffic signs along the road. Members of the public are also advised to keep in view the latest traffic news through radio, television broadcasts and “HKeMobility”.
2025-04-02T17:52:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署預計在清明節假期長周末期間，將有大量跨境乘客使用公共運輸服務經各陸路管制站往來內地及澳門，而經各陸路管制站往來內地及澳門的跨境私家車亦會顯著增加，運輸署已作出相應交通及運輸安排，並在此呼籲旅客及早規劃行程，盡量選擇於非繁忙時段出行。 市民可透過運輸署流動應用程式「香港出行易」查閱港珠澳大橋香港口岸出境及入境客車通關廣場的交通快拍，以及透過「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」或「珠海發布」微信公眾號內的「大橋口岸實時通關」服務（traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/），查閱大橋珠海口岸的車輛實時通關情況；以及透過「港珠澳大橋統一信息發佈平台」微信公眾號（mp.weixin.qq.com/s/mT9D9et-FybKKXDw9nJ9Dg），查看大橋珠海口岸車輛出入境高峰時段預測，以便及早計劃行程。此外，運輸署亦提醒駕駛人士於大橋主橋行駛時應時刻遵照珠海當局實施的交通管控措施，除獲珠海市當局指示，否則車輛一律不可佔用應急車道。 駕駛人士請注意，視乎現場交通情況，落馬洲管制站及深圳灣口岸在2025年4月4日至4月6日期間或會實施特別交通安排，以便公共運輸車輛能暢順地進入上述口岸。駕駛人士請特別留意沿途可變信息顯示屏及交通標誌。 運輸署亦請市民留意電台、電視台及「香港出行易」發放的最新交通消息。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Enhanced service during Ching Ming Festival

2025-04-03T12:06:00.CONTENT_EN:
To facilitate grave sweeping activities, MTRCL will increase train frequency on the East Rail Line during specific periods on the Ching Ming Festival (4 April) and the following Sunday (6 April). 

Service of MTR Bus route K52A between Tuen Mun Station and Tsang Tsui Columbarium will also be enhanced:
· Ching Ming Festival long weekend (4 – 6 April) and the following weekend (12 – 13 April)
· Service hours will be extended
· Frequencies will be increased to about 10 to 30 minutes during most periods

Please refer to MTRCL website for more information.
2025-04-03T12:06:00.CONTENT_CN:
清明節（4月4日）及隨後的星期日（4月6日），東鐵綫部分時段加密列車班次，方便乘客外出掃墓。

港鐵巴士K52A路綫來往屯門站及曾咀靈灰安置所亦加強服務。
·清明節長假期(4月4至6日)及下周末(4月12及13日)
·延長服務時間
·大部分時段加密至約10 至30 分鐘一班車

詳情請瀏覽港鐵公司網頁。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Cross-boundary Public Transport Services for long weekend of Ching Ming Festival Holiday
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 清明節假期長周末的跨境公共運輸服務安排

2025-04-03T18:00:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department (TD) anticipates that there may be a large number of passengers and visitors using public transport services to travel to and from the Mainland or Macao via various land-based boundary control points (BCPs) during the long weekend of the Ching Ming Festival holiday, in particular on the first day (April 4) and the last day (April 6). The TD particularly appeals to the members of the public to plan their trips in advance and allow sufficient travelling time. The TD has approached various public transport operators to strengthen their services during the long weekend in order to cater for the demand but the waiting time for the franchised bus services plying to and from BCPs and the Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) shuttle bus (Gold Bus) may be longer. Passengers are encouraged to make their journeys during non-peak hours and shall observe order and heed advice from the on-site Police and staff of the public transport service operators concerned. Members of the public are advised to check the latest traffic news through radio, television broadcasts, and TD's HKeMobility mobile application.
2025-04-03T18:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署預計清明節假期長周末期間會有大量市民和旅客使用公共運輸服務經各陸路管制站往來內地及澳門，尤其是長周末的第一天（四月四日）及最後一天（四月六日）。運輸署呼籲市民及早規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間。 運輸署已主動聯繫各公共運輸營辦商在長周末期間加強服務應對需求，但往來口岸的專營巴士及港珠澳大橋穿梭巴士（金巴）服務的等候時間或會較長。旅客應考慮於非繁忙時間出行，而在候車期間應遵守秩序，並遵從現場警務人員及相關公共運輸服務營辦商職員的指示。 市民請留意電台、電視台及運輸署流動應用程式「香港出行易」發放的最新交通消息。

2025-04-03T18:25:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to heavy traffic , the following road sections are busy:
– Lung Cheung Road (Tsuen Wan bound)
– East Kowloon Corridor (Yau Ma Tei bound)
– Tate's Cairn Highway (Sha Tin bound)
Motorists passing through the above road sections are advised to drive with utmost care and patience.
2025-04-03T18:25:00.CONTENT_CN:

–東九龍走廊(往油麻地方向)
–大老山公路(往沙田方向)
駕駛人士行經上述路段敬請忍讓及小心駕駛。

2025-04-03T20:03:00.CONTENT_EN:

– Lung Cheung Road (Tsuen Wan bound).

–大老山公路(往沙田方向)
–龍翔道(往荃灣方向)。
